---
title: "Model Prediction"
author: "Xiaoyan Wu"
email: xiaoyan.psych@gmail.com
date: "2026-02-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(here)

fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m08_SI_SCI_VCI_EC_RP_ID_lapse.rds")
)

post <- rstan::extract(fit)
```


```{r}
csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )
```


```{r}
# ===== 1. posterior mean（subject-level）=====
post_mean <- list(
  gama   = colMeans(post$gama),
  envy   = colMeans(post$envy),
  guilt  = colMeans(post$guilt),
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda),
  kapa   = colMeans(post$kapa),
  etak   = colMeans(post$etak),
  etaa   = colMeans(post$etaa),
  oumiga = colMeans(post$oumiga),
  minp   = colMeans(post$minp),
  maxp   = colMeans(post$maxp)
)

# ===== 2. Compute trial-by-trial predictions based on the Stan likelihood =====
dat <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # constants
    x3  = 5,
    x3s = x3 - cost,

    # punishment / help
    x1s = ifelse(block == 1, violator - cost * ratio, violator),
    x2s = ifelse(block == 1, victim, victim + ratio * cost),

    disad = pmax(x1s - x3s, 0) + pmax(x2s - x3s, 0),
    ad    = pmax(x3s - x1s, 0) + pmax(x3s - x2s, 0),
    inqua = pmax(x1s - x2s, 0),
    RP    = pmax(x2s - x1s, 0),

    IIk = 2 / (1 + exp(post_mean$etak[subj_index] * (cost / 50))),
    IIa = 2 / (1 + exp(post_mean$etaa[subj_index] * (cost / 50))),

    EP_yes = x1s + x2s,
    EP_no  = violator + victim,

    Uyes = x3s
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]  * disad
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index] * ad
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]  * inqua * IIa
      + post_mean$kapa[subj_index]  * RP
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_yes,

    Uno = x3
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]  * (pmax(violator - x3, 0) + pmax(victim - x3, 0))
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index] * (pmax(x3 - violator, 0) + pmax(x3 - victim, 0))
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]  * (pmax(violator - victim, 0) * IIk)
      + post_mean$kapa[subj_index]  * pmax(victim - violator, 0)
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_no,

    p_core = plogis(post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)),

    prediction = post_mean$minp[subj_index] +
      (1 - post_mean$minp[subj_index] - post_mean$maxp[subj_index]) * p_core,
    
    # ===== Bernoulli distribution prediction =====
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
    
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

```


```{r}
library(readr)

write_csv(
  dat,
  here("dataset", "trials_with_prediction.csv")
)
```


# The following sections save prediction data for each model;
# the preceding section corresponds to the best-fitting model.

# predictModel_m01.R
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )

# ---------- load fit ----------
fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m01_baseline.rds")
)

post <- rstan::extract(fit)

post_mean <- list(
  logit_p = colMeans(post$logit_p)
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id)))

# ---------- prediction ----------
dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    prediction = plogis(post_mean$logit_p[subj_index]),
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m01.csv")

```


# model 2
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )


fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m02_SI.rds")
)


post <- rstan::extract(fit)

post_mean <- list(
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda)
)


dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    x3 = 5,
    Uyes = x3 - cost,
    Uno  = x3,

    prediction = plogis(
      post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)
    ),

    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m02.csv")
```


# model 3
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )

fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m03_SI_SCI.rds")
)

post <- rstan::extract(fit)

post_mean <- list(
  envy   = colMeans(post$envy),
  guilt  = colMeans(post$guilt),
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda)
)


dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    x3  = 5,
    x3s = x3 - cost,

    x1s = ifelse(block == 1, violator - cost * ratio, violator),
    x2s = ifelse(block == 1, victim, victim + ratio * cost),

    disad = pmax(x1s - x3s, 0) + pmax(x2s - x3s, 0),
    ad    = pmax(x3s - x1s, 0) + pmax(x3s - x2s, 0),

    disad_no = pmax(violator - x3, 0) + pmax(victim - x3, 0),
    ad_no    = pmax(x3 - violator, 0) + pmax(x3 - victim, 0),

    Uyes = x3s
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]  * disad
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index] * ad,

    Uno = x3
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]  * disad_no
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index] * ad_no,

    prediction = plogis(
      post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)
    ),

    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m03.csv")
```


# model 4
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )

fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m04_SI_SCI_VCI.rds")
)


post <- rstan::extract(fit)

post_mean <- list(
  gama   = colMeans(post$gama),
  envy   = colMeans(post$envy),
  guilt  = colMeans(post$guilt),
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda)
)

dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    x3  = 5,
    x3s = x3 - cost,

    x1s = ifelse(block == 1, violator - cost * ratio, violator),
    x2s = ifelse(block == 1, victim, victim + ratio * cost),

    disad = pmax(x1s - x3s, 0) + pmax(x2s - x3s, 0),
    ad    = pmax(x3s - x1s, 0) + pmax(x3s - x2s, 0),
    inqua = pmax(x1s - x2s, 0),

    disad_no = pmax(violator - x3, 0) + pmax(victim - x3, 0),
    ad_no    = pmax(x3 - violator, 0) + pmax(x3 - victim, 0),
    inqua_no = pmax(violator - victim, 0),

    Uyes = x3s
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]  * disad
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index] * ad
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]  * inqua,

    Uno = x3
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]  * disad_no
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index] * ad_no
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]  * inqua_no,

    prediction = plogis(
      post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)
    ),

    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m04.csv")
```


# model 5
```{r}

library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )

# ---------- 1. load Stan fit ----------
fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m05_SI_SCI_VCI_EC.rds")
)

post <- rstan::extract(fit)

# subject-level posterior means
post_mean <- list(
  gama   = colMeans(post$gama),
  envy   = colMeans(post$envy),
  guilt  = colMeans(post$guilt),
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda),
  oumiga = colMeans(post$oumiga)
)

# ---------- 3. trial-level prediction ----------
dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # -------- constants --------
    x3  = 5,
    x3s = x3 - cost,

    # -------- payoff transformation --------
    x1s = ifelse(block == 1, violator - cost * ratio, violator),
    x2s = ifelse(block == 1, victim, victim + ratio * cost),

    # -------- inequality terms (YES) --------
    disad = pmax(x1s - x3s, 0) + pmax(x2s - x3s, 0),
    ad    = pmax(x3s - x1s, 0) + pmax(x3s - x2s, 0),
    inqua = pmax(x1s - x2s, 0),

    # -------- inequality terms (NO) --------
    disad_no = pmax(violator - x3, 0) + pmax(victim - x3, 0),
    ad_no    = pmax(x3 - violator, 0) + pmax(x3 - victim, 0),
    inqua_no = pmax(violator - victim, 0),

    # -------- efficiency terms --------
    EP_yes = x1s + x2s,
    EP_no  = violator + victim,

    # -------- utilities --------
    Uyes = x3s
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]   * disad
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index]  * ad
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]   * inqua
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_yes,

    Uno = x3
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]   * disad_no
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index]  * ad_no
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]   * inqua_no
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_no,

    # -------- choice probability --------
    prediction = plogis(
      post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)
    ),

    # -------- posterior predictive draw --------
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---------- 4. save output ----------
write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m05.csv")


```


# model 6
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )


# ---------- 1. load Stan fit ----------
fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m06_SI_SCI_VCI_EC_RP.rds")
)


post <- rstan::extract(fit)

# subject-level posterior means
post_mean <- list(
  gama   = colMeans(post$gama),
  envy   = colMeans(post$envy),
  guilt  = colMeans(post$guilt),
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda),
  kapa   = colMeans(post$kapa),
  oumiga = colMeans(post$oumiga)
)

# ---------- 3. trial-level prediction ----------
dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # -------- constants --------
    x3  = 5,
    x3s = x3 - cost,

    # -------- payoff transformation --------
    x1s = ifelse(block == 1, violator - cost * ratio, violator),
    x2s = ifelse(block == 1, victim, victim + ratio * cost),

    # -------- inequality terms (YES) --------
    disad = pmax(x1s - x3s, 0) + pmax(x2s - x3s, 0),
    ad    = pmax(x3s - x1s, 0) + pmax(x3s - x2s, 0),
    inqua = pmax(x1s - x2s, 0),
    RP    = pmax(x2s - x1s, 0),

    # -------- inequality terms (NO) --------
    disad_no = pmax(violator - x3, 0) + pmax(victim - x3, 0),
    ad_no    = pmax(x3 - violator, 0) + pmax(x3 - victim, 0),
    inqua_no = pmax(violator - victim, 0),
    RP_no    = pmax(victim - violator, 0),

    # -------- efficiency terms --------
    EP_yes = x1s + x2s,
    EP_no  = violator + victim,

    # -------- utilities --------
    Uyes = x3s
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]   * disad
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index]  * ad
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]   * inqua
      + post_mean$kapa[subj_index]   * RP
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_yes,

    Uno = x3
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]   * disad_no
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index]  * ad_no
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]   * inqua_no
      + post_mean$kapa[subj_index]   * RP_no
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_no,

    # -------- choice probability --------
    prediction = plogis(
      post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)
    ),

    # -------- posterior predictive draw --------
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---------- 4. save output ----------
write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m06.csv")

```


# model 7
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )


# ---------- 1. load Stan fit ----------
fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m07_SI_SCI_VCI_EC_RP_ID.rds")
)

post <- rstan::extract(fit)

# subject-level posterior means
post_mean <- list(
  gama   = colMeans(post$gama),
  envy   = colMeans(post$envy),
  guilt  = colMeans(post$guilt),
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda),
  kapa   = colMeans(post$kapa),
  etak   = colMeans(post$etak),
  etaa   = colMeans(post$etaa),
  oumiga = colMeans(post$oumiga)
)

# ---------- 3. trial-level prediction ----------
dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # -------- constants --------
    x3  = 5,
    x3s = x3 - cost,

    # -------- payoff transformation --------
    x1s = ifelse(block == 1, violator - cost * ratio, violator),
    x2s = ifelse(block == 1, victim, victim + ratio * cost),

    # -------- inequality terms (YES) --------
    disad = pmax(x1s - x3s, 0) + pmax(x2s - x3s, 0),
    ad    = pmax(x3s - x1s, 0) + pmax(x3s - x2s, 0),
    inqua = pmax(x1s - x2s, 0),
    RP    = pmax(x2s - x1s, 0),

    # -------- inequality terms (NO) --------
    disad_no = pmax(violator - x3, 0) + pmax(victim - x3, 0),
    ad_no    = pmax(x3 - violator, 0) + pmax(x3 - victim, 0),
    inqua_no = pmax(violator - victim, 0),
    RP_no    = pmax(victim - violator, 0),

    # -------- ID attention (cost-dependent) --------
    IIk = 2 / (1 + exp(post_mean$etak[subj_index] * (cost / 50))),
    IIa = 2 / (1 + exp(post_mean$etaa[subj_index] * (cost / 50))),

    # -------- efficiency terms --------
    EP_yes = x1s + x2s,
    EP_no  = violator + victim,

    # -------- utilities --------
    Uyes = x3s
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]   * disad
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index]  * ad
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]   * inqua * IIa
      + post_mean$kapa[subj_index]   * RP
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_yes,

    Uno = x3
      - post_mean$envy[subj_index]   * disad_no
      - post_mean$guilt[subj_index]  * ad_no
      - post_mean$gama[subj_index]   * inqua_no * IIk
      + post_mean$kapa[subj_index]   * RP_no
      + post_mean$oumiga[subj_index] * EP_no,

    # -------- choice probability --------
    prediction = plogis(
      post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * (Uyes - Uno)
    ),

    # -------- posterior predictive draw --------
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---------- 4. save output ----------
write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m07.csv")
```

# model 9
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )

# ---------- 1. load Stan fit ----------
fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m09_Heuristic.rds")
)


post <- rstan::extract(fit)

# subject-level posterior means
post_mean <- list(
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda),
  bs     = colMeans(post$bs),
  bi     = colMeans(post$bi),
  bc     = colMeans(post$bc),
  br     = colMeans(post$br)
)

# ---------- 3. trial-level prediction ----------
dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # -------- recode block --------
    # punish = +1, help = -1 (same as Stan)
    block_sgn = ifelse(block == 1, 1, -1),

    # -------- inequality term --------
    inequa = pmax(violator - victim, 0),

    # -------- linear predictor --------
    lin = post_mean$bs[subj_index] * block_sgn +
          post_mean$bi[subj_index] * inequa +
          post_mean$bc[subj_index] * cost +
          post_mean$br[subj_index] * ratio,

    # -------- choice probability --------
    prediction = plogis(
      -post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * lin
    ),

    # -------- posterior predictive draw --------
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---------- 4. save output ----------
write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m09.csv")

```


# model 10
```{r}
library(rstan)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

csv_path <- here("dataset", "trials_gender.csv")

dat <- read_csv(
  csv_path,
  col_types = cols(
    subject_id = col_integer(),
    gender     = col_character(),
    trial      = col_integer(),
    action     = col_integer(),
    block      = col_integer(),
    violator   = col_double(),
    victim     = col_double(),
    cost       = col_double(),
    ratio      = col_double(),
    rt         = col_double()
  )
)

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(subject_id, trial) %>%
  mutate(
    subj_index = as.integer(factor(subject_id))
  )

# ---------- 1. load Stan fit ----------
fit <- readRDS(
  here("Results", "fit_m10_Heuristic_lapse.rds")
)

post <- rstan::extract(fit)

# subject-level posterior means
post_mean <- list(
  lambda = colMeans(post$lambda),
  bs     = colMeans(post$bs),
  bi     = colMeans(post$bi),
  bc     = colMeans(post$bc),
  br     = colMeans(post$br),
  minp   = colMeans(post$minp),
  maxp   = colMeans(post$maxp)
)


# ---------- 3. trial-level prediction ----------
dat_pred <- dat %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # -------- recode block --------
    # punish = +1, help = -1
    block_sgn = ifelse(block == 1, 1, -1),

    # -------- inequality term --------
    inequa = pmax(violator - victim, 0),

    # -------- linear predictor --------
    lin = post_mean$bs[subj_index] * block_sgn +
          post_mean$bi[subj_index] * inequa +
          post_mean$bc[subj_index] * cost +
          post_mean$br[subj_index] * ratio,

    # -------- core choice probability --------
    p_core = plogis(
      -post_mean$lambda[subj_index] * lin
    ),

    # -------- lapse-adjusted probability --------
    prediction =
      post_mean$minp[subj_index] +
      (1 - post_mean$minp[subj_index] - post_mean$maxp[subj_index]) * p_core,

    # -------- posterior predictive draw --------
    prediction_bern = rbinom(1, 1, prediction)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---------- 4. save output ----------
write_csv(dat_pred, "prediction_m10.csv")

```
